creator: kris@obsecurity.org
text:
On Thu, Aug 23, 2001 at 07:56:30AM -0700, Vasya Pupkin wrote:

> [System freezen]
> 
> After rebooting system can be loaded (after checking fsck)
> 
> >How-To-Repeat:
> Try to boot with pointed hardware.
> Possilble problem: hard disk (ATA).

Try cvsupping..this problem may be fixed.  In general please report
these problems to the mailing list first before resorting to GNATS.

Kris
